name: Personal Finance Tracker
description: Built full-stack app to track income, budgeting, and purchases using JS and Supabase/PostgreSQL. Implemented secure user authentication via Supabase Auth and real-time dashboards for insights.
outcomes: Achieved real-time synchronization of transactions and robust authentication.

name: Real-Time Voice Separation with Multiple Speakers
description: Built a real-time voice separation application to evaluate pre-trained models in live audio scenarios. Designed a modular system with tunable frame lengths/overlaps to optimize latency and audio clarity.
outcomes: Optimized latency and audio clarity in live scenarios.

name: Remote Energy Monitoring System Project
description: Created a Remote Energy Monitoring System for micro-hydro plants in Indonesia. Developed React application with real-time energy monitoring through AWS IoT Core integration.
outcomes: Enabled remote plant operators to detect and respond to energy anomalies in real-time.

name: Hospital Kiosk Application - Lead Software Developer
description: Led a 10-member team in developing a Hospital Kiosk application, following agile development. Developed a robust and efficient system using Java, Hibernate ORM, and Postgres. Conducted code reviews and JUnit testing, ensuring high-quality code and adherence to best coding practices.
outcomes: Delivered MVP on schedule while maintaining 90%+ test coverage.
